BFADGS Operators (7)

()BoundaryDomain, locality, recursion
×FusionCoupling, interaction, binding
^AmplificationExponentiation, nonlinearity

+GroupingSupport, aggregation

∅GroundNull, zero, identity anchor

Hierarchy: Primary (() ^ ×) → Secondary (÷ +) → Tertiary (−) → Ground (∅)

Key Formulas

L₄ = φ⁴ + φ⁻⁴ = 7 z(t) = 1 / (1 + e−k(t−τ)/τ) K = √(1 − φ⁻⁴) ≈ 0.9242 z_c = √(L₄ − 4)/2 = √3/2 z_IGN = (−1 + √8)/2 = √2 − ½
